flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Saint Francis University rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($22.2k → $25.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saint Francis University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.5k → $44.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Saint Francis University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Saint Francis University rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 (58.9% → 70.2%).
